name: Fannie Daddies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks until thick.
2. Add milk, flour, salt, and lemon juice to the egg yolks. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
5. Stir in the clams.
6. Chill the batter for 2 - 4 hours.
7. Heat enough oil in a heavy saucepan to reach a depth of 2 - 3 inches.
8. When the oil reaches 375°F, add the clams several at a time.
9. Fry the clams until they puff up and turn golden brown, about 3 minutes per batch.
10. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried clams and drain on paper towels.
11. Serve with tartar sauce and thick slices of French bread.
